subawards.description: ROLLS-ROYCE AWARDS SUBCONTRACTS FOR PRODUCTION STOCK, THEREFORE THE AMOUNT REFLECTED IN THIS SUBCONTRACT MAY OR MAY NOT BE BILLED AGAINST THE CONTRACT UPON DELIVERY.
